title: Command Bot Command Room
summary: Compacted the Bots support dock, expanded the bot command panel into a taller bounded stage, and made bot status chips sticky while scanning the command matrix.
proof: Added tested Bots-stage CSS so the support dock becomes a compact switcher when the Bots teleport is active.
Expanded the bot command panel into a taller bounded stage and tightened bot command cards for command-room scanning.
Updated README, cache markers, snapshot generation, and regression floors so the standalone dashboard records the bot command-room unlock.
